headline: Samsung Electronics Deepens AI And Connectivity Role With New Partnerships
summary: Samsung Electronics announced new collaborations with Cadence Design Systems and Synopsys on second and third generation 2nm process technology for advanced AI chips. The company is working with Broadcom on what it describes as the industry's first unified Wi-Fi 8 and 5G fixed wireless access platform for broadband equipment. Samsung also introduced the Galaxy Book6 Enterprise Edition, a laptop aimed at secure, AI-focused productivity for corporate users. For investors watching...

headline: The AI Double-Tap That Lit Up Cadence
summary: Forget a slow drift; the company's stock was jolted higher by a pair of major AI announcements in a matter of days.

headline: Snowflake CoWork Powers the Agentic Enterprise as the Personal Agent for Knowledge Workers to Work Smarter
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 02, 2026--SNOWFLAKE SUMMIT 26--Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW), the AI Data Cloud company, today announced at Snowflake Summit 26 new AI innovations that expand how organizations build and operationalize AI across the business. The latest enhancements to Snowflake CoWork (formerly Snowflake Intelligence) help enterprises move from insight to impactful action. Built for knowledge workers, CoWork is the personal agent that helps you work smarter.

headline: GlobalFoundries completes acquisition of Synopsys’ Processor IP Solutions Business, delivering a holistic technology platform for Physical AI
summary: Combines GF's Physical AI portfolio with MIPS' RISC-V and software-to-silicon expertise to accelerate custom, software-first products for automotive, industrial and agentic edge platformsMALTA, N.Y., June 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GlobalFoundries (Nasdaq: GFS) (GF) today announced the completion of its previously-announced acquisition of Synopsys’ ARC Processor IP Solutions business.
